audit_items.proof_trace: ldap_is_write_ready() is declared and defined as returning int (ldap-int.h:757, os-ip.c:1120), not a pointer; its sole caller (result.c:354) uses the return value only as a boolean condition in an if-expression and never dereferences it. The property's premise — that a NULL-check before dereference is required — is factually inapplicable to an integer return value, so no unsafe dereference scenario exists.
